title: Cobblemon Jenny
description: The Weenies try cobblemon one more time.
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cobblemon_Jenny/BH_Cobblemon_Jenny_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cobblemon_Jenny/BH_Cobblemon_Jenny_promo2.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cobblemon_Jenny/BH_Cobblemon_Jenny_description.webp)
---

Cobblemon Jenny is a... Ah to hell with a proper description, buckle up trainers the cobblemon modpack you've always dreamed of is finally here. That's right you read that name correctly and you saw those images, jump into your dreams of Pokémon X Maidens. Enjoy a relaxing world filled with your favourite fluffy tailed, bushy eared ~~maidens~~ **Pokémon**, haha who am I kidding the only fluffy tailed, bushy eared creatures your after aren't Pokémon. Don't worry this modpack incorporates some semi-realistic gameplay, just life real life the maidens will run **away from you**, but don't worry I only said semi-realistic some won't run away, hell some will even chase after you!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cobblemon-jenny)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-jenny)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cobblemon_Jenny/BH_Cobblemon_Jenny_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Unique World Generation** - Powered by Terralith.
- [✔️] **Nothing But Pokémon** - "I want to be the very best", who knows maybe you can! Enjoy a world filled with Pokémon.
- [✔️] **Fluffy Tailed Waifus** - Enjoy a variety of different fluffy tailed, bushy eared maidens on your travels, but don't get too close! Not all of them are friendly.

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cobblemon_Jenny/BH_Cobblemon_Jenny_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
